business.headline: How this woman built a Rs 1 crore net worth by 28 before her weddingJust days before stepping into a new phase of life, a 28-year-old woman hit a goal many spend decades chasing—a Rs 1 crore net worth. And she did it without complex strategies or expert help.

Sensex jumps 700 points: Why is stock market rising today?The BSE Sensex jumped 896.70 points, or 1.17%, to 77,810.20 as of 9:50 am, while the Nifty 50 rose 262.70 points, or 1.09%, to 24,260.25 as of 9:50 am.
Sensex, Nifty jump over easing crude oil prices; Maruti leads gainsThe S&P BSE Sensex was up 778.78 points to 77,692.28, while the NSE Nifty50 jumped 223.80 points to 24,221.35 as of 9:35 am.

OnEMI Technology IPO struggles with low demand, weak GMP: Why it's high-risk betOnEMI Technology Solutions' IPO opened to soft demand, with weak retail participation and a muted GMP. The response underlines investor caution around credit risk, partner dependence and the company's ongoing transition.

Who is Rohit Jain, the new RBI deputy governor?The government has appointed Rohit Jain as an RBI deputy governor for a three-year term from May 2026. The move brings a longtime insider with banking supervision experience into a key role as portfolios are set to be reshuffled.

Thermos recalls 8.2 million containers after stoppers caused vision lossThermos has recalled 8.2 million food jars and bottles after stoppers unexpectedly ejected and injured users. The defect has been linked to pressure build-up, with 27 incidents reported and three cases of permanent vision loss.

Amid Hormuz closure, OPEC+ raises oil output quotas, no mention of UAE withdrawalSeven OPEC+ countries will raise oil output targets by 188,000 barrels per day in June, the third consecutive monthly increase, OPEC+ said in a statement after an online meeting. The increase is the same as that agreed for May minus the share of the United Arab Emirates, which left the group on May 1.
AI is helping you invest. But should you trust it?From picking stocks to timing trades, AI is becoming your new investment guide. The real question is, should you trust it with your money?

Mandatory but delayed: Why third-party motor insurance claims take years to settleHandcrafted ByOur Editors In the fourth story in our series Motor Mess, which looks at issues in motor insurance, we spoke to industry experts to understand why claims take years to settle.

Air India to cut international flights till July amid fuel surge, airspace curbsAir India will cut international flights from June to July as rising ATF prices, airspace restrictions, and longer routes make several operations unprofitable, CEO Campbell Wilson said.

How best to tackle oil shock? Dr Sajjid Z Chinoy respondsIn an interview with India Today, Dr Sajjid Z Chinoy, Chief India Economist at JP Morgan, discussed the global energy shock and its impact on the Indian economy following the recent hikes in commercial LPG and anticipated domestic fuel price increases.

Not complying with trade deal: Trump hikes tariffs on cars, trucks from EU to 25%The move comes months after Trump and European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen agreed to a new trade deal in July 2025, which set a 15 per cent tariff on most goods, including automobiles and auto parts.

Petrol, diesel prices may be hiked by Rs 4-5 per litre, LPG by Rs 40-50: SourcesPetrol and diesel prices may increase by Rs four to five per litre, while domestic LPG cylinder prices could rise by Rs 40-50 per cylinder, according to government sources.

Fuel, LPG prices may go up, decision likely within 5-7 days: Government sourcesPetrol, diesel prices may rise by Rs 4–5 per litre and LPG by Rs 40–50 per cylinder, following a sharp jump in global crude oil prices driven by West Asia war.

Will your minimum pension rise from Rs 1,000 to Rs 7,500? Find out who benefitsPensioners across the country may soon see a shift in their monthly income if the proposed changes go through. Here's what we know so far and who could benefit.

8th Pay Commission to visit Hyderabad, Srinagar, Ladakh: What does this mean?The 8th Pay Commission is taking its discussions beyond Delhi, with visits planned to Hyderabad, Srinagar and Ladakh. But what does this outreach mean for government employees and pensioners awaiting revisions?

Paytm sees strong user trust and high merchant stickiness post PPBL actionBrokerage firms tracking the company said the RBI action on PPBL has limited direct impact on Paytm's core business operations, given the structural separation between the listed entity and the payments bank.

Earning Rs 50,000 a month? The right way to spend, save and investManaging money at Rs 50,000 a month isn't just about covering expenses, it's about making choices that shape your financial future. But are you allocating it in the right way?

From petrol to food, why could everything get costlier togetherA mix of higher oil prices, a weaker rupee and monsoon risks is putting pressure on India's economy. The overlap could lift household costs, limit policy choices and raise stagflation concerns.

GST at record Rs 2.43 lakh crore in April, but domestic demand growth slowsA major part of April's growth came from import-related revenues. GST collected on imports rose sharply by 25.8% to Rs 57,580 crore.

entertainment.headline: Patriot box office Day 3: Rs 63 crore global haul despite India slowdown Patriot opened well on Friday but lost pace in India over the weekend as overseas markets stayed strong. Its Rs 63.61 crore worldwide start was driven largely by diaspora turnout, pushing the film past Rs 50 crore in three days.

Fans touch Riteish Deshmukh's feet during surprise Raja Shivaji screening visit Riteish Deshmukh made a surprise visit to a Mumbai screening of Raja Shivaji, where fans touched his feet. The emotional scenes added to the film's buzz as audiences cheered his portrayal of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj.

Naagin 7 goof-up goes viral, fans slam makers over VFX mistake A blue screen was left visible in a key Naagin 7 scene streamed on JioHotstar. The editing mistake sparked online criticism and revived complaints about the show's VFX before the June 7 finale.

What Javed Akhtar said about propaganda films after admitting love for Dhurandhar 2 Javed Akhtar said films should be free to promote ideas, as he addressed criticism around Dhurandhar. His remarks added to the wider debate over whether popular narratives are being branded propaganda.

Dhurandhar 2 box office Day 46: Now No. 2 Indian film worldwide, Baahubali 2 falls Aditya Dhar's Dhurandhar: The Revenge has overtaken Baahubali 2 worldwide after 46 days in theatres. The milestone makes it the second highest-grossing Indian film globally, behind only Dangal.

Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal make first public outing after son Vihaan's birth Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal were clicked together at Mumbai airport after their son Vihaan's birth. The outing drew attention as their first public appearance as parents.

Raja Shivaji box office Day 3: Riteish's film stays strong over opening weekend Raja Shivaji grossed Rs 40.34 crore in India over its opening weekend and remained steady on Sunday, Day 3. The Marathi version led the collections, while the Hindi version also contributed to the film's overall momentum.

Mahavatar Parshuram, Ashwatthama, Drona: Rise of unsung ancient legends on screen Indian mainstream cinema is looking to score big at the box office with stories of unsung mythological and folk heroes. Beyond Ram, Krishna, Hanuman or Mahadev, producers are exploring tales of Parashuram, Drona, Shukracharya, Agastya Muni and Ashwathhama.

Trisha prays at Tirupati on birthday, fans link it to Vijay as TVK leads Trisha Krishnan visited Tirupati Temple and shared her journey on Instagram ahead of her 43rd birthday. The quiet visit later drew speculation online, relating to Tamil Nadu election results.

Huma Qureshi to marry rumoured boyfriend Rachit Singh this year? What we know Huma Qureshi and rumoured boyfriend Rachit Singh are preparing to get married later this year. The wedding is expected to be intimate in Mumbai, followed by an industry reception.

Gulzar, Javed Akhtar to Zoya: Bollywood weighs in on Oscars 2027's AI rules Indian screenwriters and filmmakers have reacted after the Academy announced new AI rules for the 2027 Oscars. The responses revealed support for protecting human creativity, alongside caution that AI remains a limited tool.

Shah Rukh Khan celebrates Sunil Narine's 200 IPL wickets with moving post Sunil Narine became the first overseas player to take 200 IPL wickets during KKR's match against Sunrisers Hyderabad. Shah Rukh Khan marked the milestone with a warm tribute, calling the spinner a magician and family.

Anil Kapoor marks 41 years of Yudh, recalls nervous dance moment with Hema Malini Anil Kapoor revisited memories of his 1985 film Yudh as it completed 41 years, reflecting on an early career phase. He said playing a double role was easy, but dancing with Hema Malini left him nervous and challenged by her screen presence.

Janhvi Kapoor shares post calling out misleading reports about her alcohol remark Janhvi Kapoor's initiative for alcohol addiction awareness issued a statement clarifying that her recent remarks on alcohol had been misinterpreted by sections of the media. The statement described the actor as a caregiver and ally associated with the cause.

Actor-producer Sudesh Kumar dies at 95 in Mumbai, prayer meet on May 4 Actor and producer Sudesh Kumar died at 95 in Mumbai after health complications. He is survived by his wife and daughter. A prayer meet is scheduled for the late artiste on May 4.

Rahul Roy urges fans not to believe fake videos seeking money in his name Rahul Roy asked viewers not to believe or engage with fake videos seeking money in his name. He clarified that he is safe, well cared for by his family and his lifestyle choices are personal.

Viral: Jaafar Jackson reacts to Bharatanatyam fusion on Michael Jackson song Jaafar Jackson reacted to a viral Indian classical fusion dance video set to a Michael Jackson song. His comment on dancer Swetha Warrier's tribute reel drew wider attention online.

Ranveer Allahbadia takes cheeky dig at past row after Kapil Sharma show. See post Ranveer Allahbadia grabbed attention with his post after The Kapil show appearance, taking a cheeky dig at India's Got Latent row while also dedicating the moment to his late grandfather.

Ssunita Ahuja takes fresh dig at Govinda's shooting incident on Laughter Chefs 3 Ssunita Ahuja joked about Govinda and his shooting incident during Laughter Chefs 3's appearance. The remark, along with ongoing rumours around their marriage, has renewed attention on the couple.

general news.headline: BJP in, Didi out. Saffron sweeps BengalThe BJP is on course to wrest Bengal from Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool Congress as the saffron side is nearing 200 seats in a historic victory. The BJP has, for years, longed to take the eastern state, and now it's on a comfortable path to do it, breaking the TMC's 15-year reign in Bengal.

Vijay's whistle podu: Options before TVK to form govt in Tamil NaduActor-turned-politician Vijay made a thunderous debut in Tamil Nadu, a state that has a long history of electing film stars as leaders. Vijay had promised change amidst the Dravidian duopoly. However, if the TVK fails to reach the halfway mark, what options does it have?

UDF eyes best Kerala show since 2001, set for landslide as LDF trails badlyThe Congress-led UDF is heading for its best performance since 2001, crossing 95 seats in early Kerala trends, with the LDF trailing toward a decisive defeat.

NDA crosses 100-mark in Assam as BJP-led alliance eyes best ever performanceEarly counting trends from Assam point to a dramatic political shift as the BJP-led NDA surges past the 100-seat mark, while opposition parties struggle to keep pace across key constituencies as results continue to unfold.

Trisha prays at Tirupati on birthday, fans link it to Vijay as TVK leadsTrisha Krishnan visited Tirupati Temple and shared her journey on Instagram ahead of her 43rd birthday. The quiet visit later drew speculation online, relating to Tamil Nadu election results.

Blockbuster Vijay: DMK's loss is TVK's gain, show Tamil Nadu leadsEarly counting trends show Vijay's Tamilaga Vetri Kazhagam leading in 46 seats and topping vote share. The figures suggest TVK is cutting into both DMK and AIADMK support and could emerge as the state's single-largest party.

Live: Congress-led UDF dominates Kerala landslide, CM Pinarayi Vijayan trailsKerala Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: Will the Left Democratic Front (LDF) secure a historic third term, or will the Congress end its decade-long drought from power? Or will the votes stack up in a way that allows the BJP to emerge as a decisive force in Kerala? The state has witnessed a robust voter turnout of nearly 80 per cent. Voting across all 140 seats began at 8 am, with early trends giving an edge to the Congress-led UDF. By midday, it will become clear whether Pinarayi Vijayan can overcome anti-incumbency or if the VD Satheesan-led opposition will bring an end to the CPI(M)-led Left rule. Stay tuned to India Today for real-time updates on the Kerala Assembly election results.

DMK workers seen packing up at Chennai office as TVK show pushes party to 3rd spotEarly counting trends in Tamil Nadu showed the AIADMK, Vijay's TVK and the DMK locked in a close contest. The numbers hinted at TVK's emergence as a major player as the mood at the DMK headquarters turned grim.

The seven Ms setting the tone for Bengal high-stakes poll battleBengal's 2026 election battle is being framed around five key Ms alongside Modi and Mamata. The shift marks a move from Mamata Banerjee's old 'maa, maati, manush' pitch to a broader electoral calculus.

Live: Mamata Banerjee holds lead in Bhabanipur as BJP nears historic win in BengalBhabanipur Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: Counting of votes is underway in Bhabanipur, with Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee currently holding the lead in the constituency even as broader trends across West Bengal show the BJP firmly ahead. Leads have stabilised across the state, with the BJP crossing the halfway mark in trends, pointing to a significant shift in the overall contest. In Bhabanipur, however, the high-profile battle between Banerjee and BJP leader Suvendu Adhikari continues to remain closely watched. The constituency, widely seen as Banerjee's political stronghold in south Kolkata, carries significance beyond a routine seat and is closely tied to her political journey. The face-off with Adhikari revives a familiar rivalry from the 2021 election. Counting began at 8 am, with postal ballots taken up first, followed by EVM rounds through the day. While state-level trends indicate a strong showing for the BJP, the focus remains on how the contest unfolds in Bhabanipur. Stay with IndiaToday.in for live updates on leads, margins and key developments from the constituency.

Godrej Industries lays out 2031 growth ambitionsThe purpose statement, 'Crafting tomorrow since 1897', celebrates the Godrej Group's legacy while clearly positioning the new, refreshed Godrej Industries for the future.

Live: NDA comfortably past halfway mark in Assam as BJP ahead in 79 seatsAssam Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: The counting of votes for the 2026 Assembly election in Assam is underway. Voters in the state had sealed the fate of 722 candidates across 126 constituencies on April 9, with 85.96 per cent of the over 2.50 crore electorate exercising their franchise. The EVMs were opened at 40 counting centres spread across all 35 districts of Assam amid tight security arrangements at 8 am. While the BJP-led NDA is seeking a third consecutive term in the northeastern state, the Congress is hopeful of wresting power from the ruling alliance. Follow IndiaToday.in for all the latest updates on counting day.

What Javed Akhtar said about propaganda films after admitting love for Dhurandhar 2Javed Akhtar said films should be free to promote ideas, as he addressed criticism around Dhurandhar. His remarks added to the wider debate over whether popular narratives are being branded propaganda.

Live: Congress's Ramesh Pisharody leads BJP's Shobha Surendran in tight fightPalakkad Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: The Palakkad Assembly constituency has emerged as one of the most closely watched battlegrounds, witnessing a triangular contest between the Congress-led UDF's candidate, actor Ramesh Pisharody, the BJP's Shobha Surendran and CPI(M)-backed NMR Razak. Traditionally a competitive seat, the spotlight has intensified this time not only due to the BJP's strong performance but also because the constituency was represented by former Congress MLA Rahil Mamkootathil, who faces multiple sexual harassment allegations. The primary contest is between the Congress and the BJP, as vote counting began at 8 am. Stay tuned to India Today for all the latest updates from Kerala's Palakkad Assembly seat.

Live: Vijay leads in Trichy East by 5,000 votes, TVK goes past 100Tiruchirappalli East Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: Vijay is leading in both Perambur and Trichy East. Meanwhile, TVK has raced past 100 seats, as per trends in the afternoon. Can Vijay's TVK get the majority mark of 118?

Trump launches Project Freedom to free stranded Hormuz shipsDonald Trump said the US will escort foreign ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz under Project Freedom. He described the move as humanitarian but warned against interference as talks with Iran continue.

BMW launches M440i Convertible in India at Rs 1.09 crore, takes on CLE CabrioletBMW has launched the BMW M440i Convertible in India at Rs 1.09 crore, introducing a premium open-top performance model to rival the Mercedes-Benz CLE Cabriolet in the segment.

Live: TVK's Vijay stuns DMK in Perambur, leads by 8,000 votesPerambur Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: DMK's RD Shekhar, TVK's Joseph Vijay and 45 candidates are contesting from Perambur in Tamil Nadu's Assembly Election 2026. Will Vijay pull a shocker in his first election?

Live: Can Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury reclaim seat lost to BJP?Baharampur Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: Baharampur, a general category Assembly constituency in Murshidabad district and part of the Baharampur Lok Sabha seat, is witnessing a high-stakes three-cornered contest with Subrata Maitra of the BJP taking on Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury of the Congress and Naru Gopal Mukherjee of the Trinamool Congress.

Jorhat Assembly Election Results Live: Congress's Gaurav Gogoi trails by over 13,000 votes in prestige battleJorhat Assembly Election Result Live: Congress Leader Gaurav Gogoi is trailing by over 9,000 votes at Jorhat Assembly constituency. The BJP's Hitendra Nath Goswami is leading with over 27,900 votes. Gaurav Gogoi has bagged 18,000 votes after 6 rounds of counting at Jorhat.

More rain coming: Kolkata on watch as system drifts after drenching Delhi-NCROvernight storms brought rain, gusty winds and a sharp temperature drop across Delhi-NCR. Forecasters say the relief may be brief, with fresh thunderstorms possible by evening.

Panihati Election Result 2026 Live: RG Kar victim's mother leads again as TMC struggles to hold groundPanihati Assembly Election Results 2026 Live Updates: Vote counting is underway in this key North 24 Parganas seat, where BJP's Ratna Debnath and TMC's Tirthankar Ghosh are locked in a high-stakes contest shaped by the RG Kar case.

At least 10 injured in shooting at lake party near Oklahoma CityA shooting at a party near Arcadia Lake left at least 10 people injured. Police are interviewing victims and witnesses, and say there is no ongoing threat to the public.

By-Election Live: Sunetra Pawar surges in Baramati; BJP leads across states, Congress ahead in BagalkotBy-Election Result 2026 Live: Counting of votes has begun for seven Assembly bypoll seats across Gujarat, Karnataka, Maharashtra, Nagaland and Tripura. The April 9 bypolls, held alongside the Assembly elections in West Bengal, Assam, Tamil Nadu, Kerala and Puducherry, may not directly alter political equations but are being watched for signs of local anti-incumbency and shifting voter mood. The key contest is in Maharashtra's Baramati, vacated after the death of Deputy Chief Minister and NCP chief Ajit Pawar, where his wife Sunetra Pawar is contesting from the Pawar family stronghold. Saty tuned to indiatoday.in for all the latest updates on counting day.

sports.headline: MI vs LSG preview: Mumbai, Lucknow fight for survival as elimination threat IPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Hardik Pandya's Mumbai Indians and Rishabh Pant's Lucknow Super Giants have their backs to the wall and will have their task cut out when they face each other on Monday at the Wankhede Stadium.

Shubman Gill continues social media banter, this time teases PBKS in Insta post IPL 2026: Shubman Gill followed Gujarat Titans' win over Punjab Kings with another teasing social media post. The post extended his pattern of post-match banter and drew fresh online reaction.

When Siraj's opening-over storm blew away PBKS top order IPL 2026: Mohammed Siraj struck twice in the opening over to derail Punjab Kings against Gujarat Titans. The burst exposed how heavily Punjab's batting depends on a fast powerplay start.

Manchester United to hand Carrick permanent role after Champions League return? Manchester United beat Liverpool 3-2 at Old Trafford to secure Champions League qualification under caretaker boss Michael Carrick. The result has sharpened the debate over whether Carrick should get the job permanently.

World Relays: India end disappointing campaign with injury and DNF India's campaign at the World Athletics Relays ended on a disappointing note, marred by injuries, disqualifications and a string of failed baton exchanges. However, the mixed 4x100m relay team broke the National Record with a strong timing of 41.35 seconds.

KKR players smash cake on Andre Russell's face after win vs SRH In perhaps the most hilarious match-winning celebration in the Indian Premier League this season, KKR's player turned coach Andre Russell had cake smashed all over his face after the team beat SunRisers Hyderabad. KKR beat 3rd placed SRH in Hyderabad on Sunday.

GT survive PBKS' last over scare, tame chase drags into tense Ahmedabad finish GT vs PBKS, IPL 2026: Gujarat Titans survived a tense final-over scare to beat Punjab Kings by four wickets in Ahmedabad, with Suryansh Shedge's rescue act and Punjab's late fight turning 163 into a gripping thriller.

Is this peak IPL? Mark Wood reveals bizarre story about team owner England pacer Mark Wood narrated a bizarre story from his IPL stint, revealing how a franchise owner once offered to fly him in on a private plane to play a match in the tournament. Can you guess what IPL team and owner this could have been?

India will get the best out of Nandni Sharma: Jemimah Rodrigues backs young pacer Jemimah Rodrigues backed young fast bowler Nandni Sharma to deliver for India in the Women's T20 World Cup later this year after she earned her maiden national call-up for the global event.

Manchester United vs Liverpool: Unconscious Alex Ferguson taken to hospital Former Manchester United manager Sir Alex Ferguson was taken to hospital after feeling unwell ahead of the team's Premier League clash against Liverpool on Sunday. Ferguson had fallen unconscious ahead of the game at Old Trafford.

Jannik Sinner boosts French Open hopes after historic Madrid Open title run Madrid Open: World No.1 Jannik Sinner clinched the title after defeating Alexander Zverev 6-1, 6-2 in the final in just 57 minutes. He will now aim to complete a Career Golden Masters when he competes at the Italian Open.

Who is Suryansh Shedge? Punjab Kings youngster steps-up vs GT in AhmedabadIPL 2026: Suryansh Shedge announced his arrival in the Indian Premier League with a fighting fifty for Punjab Kings against Gujarat Titans. Coming into bat with his side in crisis, Shedge's counter-attacking knock helped revive the innings in Ahmedabad.

Ramakrishna Ghosh ruled out of IPL 2026, sustains foot fracture after IPL debutIPL 2026: CSK's injury troubles worsened as Ramakrishna Ghosh was ruled out of IPL 2026 with a foot fracture, ending the uncapped all-rounder's campaign just after his debut

Shubman, getting married? Danny Morrison's question leaves GT captain irritatedIPL 2026: Shubman Gill was left visibly irritated after commentator Danny Morrison asked him a personal question at the toss ahead of Gujarat Titans' clash against Punjab Kings. Here's what happened at the toss in Ahmedabad.

Rishabh Pant bogged down by price tag? LSG bowling coach addresses batter's poor formIPL 2026, MI vs LSG: Bharat Arun said the price tag has nothing to do with Rishabh Pant's indifferent run of form. The LSG bowling coach backed the captain to bounce back despite his modest returns this season.

India must tackle doping crisis to host Olympics: International Testing AgencyIndia must urgently reform its anti-doping system to strengthen its 2036 Olympics bid, with ITA chief Benjamin Cohen warning that testing lapses and weak governance remain major concerns.

Spin twins Varun and Narine halt SRH juggernaut in Hyderabad as KKR hang onIPL 2026: Varun Chakravarthy and Sunil Narine spun SunRisers Hyderabad into submission, restricting them to 165 before Angkrish Raghuvanshi and Ajinkya Rahane completed a controlled chase. Three wins from three. KKR's unlikely revival has a heartbeat now.

GT vs PBKS Highlights: Gujarat Titans edge past Punjab Kings in last-over thrillerGT (Gujarat) vs PBKS (Punjab) Highlights, IPL 2026: Gujarat Titans beat the Punjab Kings by four wickets at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad. Chasing 164, the Titans got home with one ball to spare.

PV Sindhu joins Kaavya Maran to cheer for SunRisers in HyderabadSRH vs KKR: One of India's top badminton players, PV Sindhu, attended the Indian Premier League match between SunRisers Hyderabad and Kolkata Knight Riders. Sindhu hung out with SRH owner Kaviya Maran at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium.

200 for Sunil Narine: KKR great becomes first overseas bowler to hit double tonIPL 2026: Sunil Narine became only the third bowler to go past 200 wickets in the Indian Premier League. The West Indies great took two wickets in a disciplined bowling effort from Kolkata Knight Riders in Hyderabad on Sunday, May 3.

Jemimah Rodrigues says India hungry to keep title run going with T20 World CupJemimah Rodrigues said India are hungrier than ever for a second world title, with the team targeting T20 World Cup success in England after last year's landmark ODI triumph.

Manish Pandey gets a game in IPL 2026, joins Rohit and Virat in elite listIPL 2026: Kolkata Knight Riders recalled Manish Pandey for the SunRisers Hyderabad match, replacing Ramandeep Singh. The appearance placed him alongside Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma as players to feature in all 19 IPL seasons.

IPL throwback: How Ashwin got MS Dhoni to lose his cool, earn his big break at CSKR Ashwin recalled how dismissing MS Dhoni in the Challenger Trophy and celebrating the wicket earned attention, helped him break into CSK, and began a long cricketing bond.

Mittal family and Adar Poonawalla buy Rajasthan Royals in Rs 15,660 crore dealContrary to past reports, Steel giants the Mittal family and billionaire Adar Poonawalla have acquired Rajasthan Royals for Rs 15,660 crore. The sale of the champions of the inaugural edition of the IPL comes on the heels of the record-breaking sale of Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

I was harassed by Brij Bhushan, I am one of the six victims: Vinesh PhogatOlympian Vinesh Phogat, a key face of the 2023 New Delhi protests, has identified herself as one of the six women harassed by Brij Bhushan Sharan Singh, alleging upcoming trials for Asian Games 2026 are rigged to block her comeback.

Hardik is a plastic captain: Ex-selector slams MI skipper's intent in CSK lossKris Srikkanth tore into Hardik Pandya after Mumbai Indians' outing against Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. The criticism centred on Pandya's 18 off 23 balls and CSK's method of tying him down through the middle overs.
The Vibhuti Effect: Why do India's chess prodigies swear by the sacred ash?Why India's chess prodigies carry an ancient ritual into the world's most cerebral arena, and what it's doing to their game.

Has Hardik lost MI dressing room?EX-IND batter's big claim after CSK defeatManoj Tiwary said Hardik Pandya appears to have lost the Mumbai Indians dressing room after the defeat to Chennai Super Kings. He said the side looked fundamentally unsettled, with limited backing for the captain and inconsistent performances damaging the campaign.

No longer CSK's Rs. 14.2 Crore gamble, Kartik Sharma spreads his wings in yellowKartik Sharma finally proved that he wasn't just a big-money gamble for CSK, repaying the faith of the management by scoring a well-composed fifty to get his side the win in the El Clasico against Mumbai.

IPL 2026: Punjab's bowling in focus as Gujarat look to spice up playoffs raceThe IPL 2026 playoff race is heating up as Gujarat Titans look to keep their momentum going against the in-form Punjab Kings. Sunrisers Hyderabad will aim to edge closer to a spot in the playoffs as they come up against a resurgent KKR side.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
